modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks Spanish as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show strong technical proficiency. There should be no spelling errors and some redundant repeated information.
raw_text:
short_description_text: USB scanner not detected after Windows 11 update.

full_description_text: After the recent Windows 11 update, the computer is unable to detect the USB scanner. The user is experiencing issues with the scanner not being recognized. This problem arose immediately following the update.
short_description: USB scanner not detected after Windows 11 update.
description: After the recent Windows 11 update, the computer is unable to detect the USB scanner. The user is experiencing issues with the scanner not being recognized. This problem arose immediately following the update.
